name: FRIEDMAN INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Friedman Industries, Incorporated is a Texas-based manufacturer and processor of steel products operating in two segments: flat-roll products and tubular products. The flat-roll segment operates five hot-rolled coil processing facilities across Arkansas, Alabama, Indiana, Illinois, and Texas, producing sheet and plate steel. The tubular segment, Texas Tubular Products, operates two electric resistance welded pipe mills in Lone Star, Texas, manufacturing line pipe, oil country pipe, and structural pipe ranging from 2 3/8 OD to 8 5/8 OD.

products.name: Flat-Roll Steel Products
products.description: Hot-rolled coil processed into sheet and plate steel, ranging 16 gauge to 1 inch thick and 36 to 96 inches wide, sold wholesale on rapid-delivery basis.

products.name: Coil Processing and Storage Services
products.description: Fee-based processing and storage of customer-owned steel coils at flat-roll facilities.

products.name: Tubular Steel Products
products.description: Electric resistance welded pipe (2 3/8 OD to 8 5/8 OD) including API-licensed line pipe, oil country pipe, and structural pipe.
